behavior_summary: The script implements a U8P_GHOSTHED::look/inspect handler for an in-game object labeled 'ghost head'.
When the player examines the object, U8P_GHOSTHED::look emits a single short bark/text 'ghost head' visible to the player.
Immediately after displaying the bark the process suspends/ends (there are no branches, menus, flag reads/writes, or external calls).
notable_control_flow: Entry: U8P_GHOSTHED::look-type process is invoked (processType 0x0208) when the player uses the 'U8P_GHOSTHED::look' action on the object.
Action: single Bark node displays text.
Termination: a suspend token follows the bark, causing the U8P_GHOSTHED::look process to yield/terminate with no further behavior.
open_questions: None critical for gameplay: behavior is minimal and self-contained. (Minor question: whether the suspend is intended to yield for timing or to terminate immediately — inferred only.)

main_function.name: U8P_GHOSTHED::look
main_function.purpose: Provide the short examination description for the object by showing the text 'ghost head' when the player looks at it.
entry_conditions: Invoked by the engine when the player examines or 'looks' at the object (U8P_GHOSTHED::look/inspect action).
Runs as a U8P_GHOSTHED::look-type process (processType 0x0208); no additional flags or gating conditions present in the extracted script.

function_map.name: U8P_GHOSTHED::look
function_map.role: Handles the object's U8P_GHOSTHED::look/examine interaction; displays the short bark 'ghost head' then suspends.

quick_facts.behavior_summary_one_liner: The script implements a U8P_GHOSTHED::look/inspect handler for an in-game object labeled 'ghost head'.
